expectations.text: New description is intent-forward ('用户...时进入' / 'When X happens'), not capability-style ('Helps find...')
expectations.evidence: Contains 'Use when the user presents a concrete failure artifact...' — a When-X-happens clause. Opening sentence is capability-style ('Root-causes a specific failing behavior...') but intent-forward framing dominates via 'Use when ...' and 'Skip for ...'.

expectations.text: New description includes concrete user trigger phrases that match realistic bug-reporting scenarios (stack trace, error log, symptom)
expectations.evidence: Names 'error message, exception, stack trace, crash log, test failure output' and symptom templates 'X throws / returns wrong value / hangs / crashes when Y'; when_to_use repeats 'pasted stack traces, error logs, exception names'.

expectations.text: New description has explicit boundary / exclusion to prevent over-triggering on any coding task
expectations.evidence: Explicit 'Skip for forward-direction work ... writing new features, refactoring clean code, general code review, style or performance tuning' plus 'Do not trigger on generic coding help, feature work, or reviews...' in when_to_use.

expectations.text: Rationale explains why the old description ('Helps find bugs in code') failed to auto-trigger — diagnoses the actual root cause
expectations.evidence: Rationale lists four diagnoses: 'No trigger surface', 'Ambiguously broad', 'No negative space', 'Wrong verb framing' — each tied to matcher behavior ('a conservative matcher ... gives up and fires on nothing').

expectations.text: Output is primarily in Chinese (matches user's language)
expectations.evidence: User prompted in Chinese, but both new-description.md and rationale.md are written entirely in English (e.g., 'What was wrong with', 'Should match:', 'Residual risk').

expectations.text: New description (plus when_to_use if any) is under the 1,536-character cap
expectations.evidence: description = 880 chars, when_to_use = 283 chars, combined total = 1163 chars — under the 1,536 cap.
